channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbusinessAndMarkets
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbusinessAndMarkets, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Discord group's Mythos access shows AI hacking danger
item.description: Unauthorized access to Anthropic's Mythos model signals deeper risks.

item.title: AI Is Changing Growth, but These 5 Strategies Still Win
item.description: New tech, same fundamentals. AI hasn’t rewritten all the rules.

item.title: BTS launches food and drink brand Arih
item.description: K-pop group launches Walmart-exclusive line of noodles, energy drinks, and sodas.

item.title: 3 key elements every change strategy needs
item.description: Experts suggest leveraging social proof for effective change strategies.

item.title: Trump's Canada trade war costs Jack Daniel's, Jim Beam $143M
item.description: Canada went from top whiskey buyer to major loss, costing U.S. spirits $143 million.
